scripts.supabase:restart: docker rm -f $(docker ps -aq --filter name=supabase) || true && bunx supabase start
scripts.supabase:deploy: bunx supabase functions deploy check && bunx supabase functions deploy stripe-checkout && bunx supabase functions deploy stripe-webhook && bunx supabase functions deploy stripe-cancel && bunx supabase functions deploy account-delete && bunx supabase functions deploy generate-test-key && bunx supabase functions deploy health
